title: Side Handle Rotary Hammer Replacement Part Compatible for Bosch 11311EVS MH10-SE GSH 11E Power Tool Accessory Black
features: Compatibility: This side handle is specially designed for Bosch Rotary Hammer models 11311EVS, MH10-SE, GSH 11E and other 11E series, providing a direct replacement that fits securely to your power tool for improved handling and control during demanding drilling tasks.

Easy Installation: The replacement side handle attaches quickly without requiring professional assistance - simply screw it onto your rotary hammer in seconds and continue with your project, saving you time and frustration compared to working with a damaged handle.

Premium Construction: Crafted from high-grade plastic and metal components, this side handle delivers exceptional strength and stability while operating your rotary hammer, helping to absorb vibration and reduce user fatigue during extended periods of use.

Ergonomic Design: Featuring a comfortable grip pattern and balanced weight distribution, this side handle for Bosch tools provides enhanced operator comfort and precise control, allowing for more accurate drilling and chiseling in challenging materials and awkward positions.

Safety Enhancement: Adding this replacement side handle to your rotary hammer significantly improves workplace safety by offering better two-handed control during high-torque operations, reducing the risk of tool slippage and potential injuries while tackling tough construction projects.
